Title: Sitemap override — _redirects shadows public/sitemap.xml with Supabase edge function
RecommendedAction: Fetch https://matchvenezuelan.com/sitemap.xml — verify all 41 LP URLs are present. If missing: remove /sitemap.xml line from _redirects so static file is served OR fix the Supabase seo-feed edge function to include all 41 slugs
QAOwnerNotes: Fetch raw sitemap and verify slug count equals 41+. Submit updated sitemap to Google Search Console.

Title: SPA catch-all redirect missing — direct URL access to non-root paths may 404
RecommendedAction: Add /* /index.html 200 as final line in public/_redirects
QAOwnerNotes: After deploy: curl -I https://matchvenezuelan.com/meet-venezuelan-women and verify 200 not 404.

Title: Homepage hero image 1.5 MB JPEG — catastrophic LCP failure
RecommendedAction: Convert hero-portrait.jpg to WebP <100KB. Replace import in Home.tsx.
QAOwnerNotes: PageSpeed Insights mobile LCP must drop below 4s after fix. Target: <2.5s.

Title: Logo PNG 1.48 MB served on every page — kills LCP on all routes
Enables: I007 (OG image fix meaningful after compression); I015
RecommendedAction: Convert logo to WebP or SVG <20KB. Update all references in PublicHeader and StructuredData.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify logo renders correctly in header and OG preview. PageSpeed Insights — LCP improvement on non-homepage routes.

Title: Relative canonical href=/ in index.html — invalid; breaks non-JS crawlers and social scrapers
RecommendedAction: Change <link rel=canonical href=/> to <link rel=canonical href=https://matchvenezuelan.com/>
QAOwnerNotes: view-source:https://matchvenezuelan.com — verify absolute canonical in raw HTML.

Title: Relative OG image /logo.png in index.html — Facebook/Slack/WhatsApp get broken preview
RecommendedAction: Change <meta property=og:image content=/logo.png> to absolute URL https://matchvenezuelan.com/logo.png. Also create 1200x630px WebP OG image <200KB.
QAOwnerNotes: Facebook Sharing Debugger — verify OG image renders. After Sprint 2 OG image creation: re-verify.

Title: hreflang default fallback in seo.ts declares en+es+x-default at EN-only URLs — misinforms Google
AffectedRoutes: All EN-only routes (HowItWorks; Legal; Resources; Safety)
RecommendedAction: Remove 3-hreflang default. Replace with: [{hreflang:'en' href:url} {hreflang:'x-default' href:url}] for EN-only pages.
QAOwnerNotes: hreflang.org validator — verify no false ES signals on EN-only pages after fix. Must recheck all routes.

Title: Broken SearchAction in StructuredData.tsx — /search route does not exist in App.tsx
RecommendedAction: Change SearchAction target from ${SITE_URL}/search?q={search_term_string} to ${SITE_URL}/resources?q={search_term_string}.
QAOwnerNotes: Google Rich Results Test — verify no SearchAction errors after fix.

Title: Duplicate WebSite JSON-LD — both StructuredData.tsx and Home.tsx useSeo emit WebSite block
RecommendedAction: Remove WebSite JSON-LD from StructuredData.tsx (keep static Organization only). Let Home.tsx useSeo be the canonical WebSite emitter.
QAOwnerNotes: Google Rich Results Test — verify single WebSite block on homepage after fix.

Title: Missing DatingService schema — Google cannot classify business type; zero rich-result eligibility
BlockedBy: I012 (sameAs links needed for entity completeness); I013 (About page needed for URL)
AffectedRoutes: Add DatingService JSON-LD to Home: serviceType: International Dating; areaServed; foundingDate; sameAs; url. Link to /about.
RecommendedAction: Google Rich Results Test — verify DatingService entity recognized.

Title: Organization sameAs: [] — no social entity links; Google cannot disambiguate business entity
AffectedRoutes: All pages (Organization emitted on every page)
RecommendedAction: Add all live social profile URLs to sameAs array: Facebook; Instagram; Twitter/X; LinkedIn; TikTok (whatever exists).
QAOwnerNotes: Manually verify each social URL is reachable and points to correct profile.

Title: No /about page — YMYL site with zero company story; moderation team info; trust signals
Enables: I014 (expert author can link to About); I011 (DatingService can reference About URL)
RecommendedAction: Create /about route in App.tsx. Create About.tsx page: company story; founding mission; moderation process; team bio (even pseudonymous Venezuelan cultural advisor).
QAOwnerNotes: Verify /about indexed in Google Search Console within 2 weeks of deploy.

Title: Anonymous blog authorship — all posts authored by Organization not named expert
BlockedBy: I013 (About page should exist before adding named author)
RecommendedAction: Create expert author persona (e.g. María Rodríguez — Venezuelan Cultural Advisor). Update ResourceDetail author logic. Update blog_posts DB or template to use named author.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify author name appears in BlogPosting JSON-LD via Rich Results Test after fix.

Title: Missing fetchPriority=high on homepage hero img — LCP image not prioritized by browser
BlockedBy: I003 (compress image first — fetchPriority only helps if image is small)
RecommendedAction: Add fetchPriority=high and loading=eager to homepage hero img tag. Also add <link rel=preload as=image> in index.html for the hero WebP.
QAOwnerNotes: PageSpeed Insights — verify LCP score improvement after both I003 and I015 applied together.

Title: Footer has zero links to landing pages — 90+ page-impressions wasting PageRank distribution
RecommendedAction: Add 4-5 top landing pages to footer Product column: Meet Venezuelan Women; Venezuelan Dating Site; Venezuelan Women for Marriage; Dating Culture; Verified Profiles.
QAOwnerNotes: Crawl internal link report after deploy — verify landing pages show new footer link source.

Title: Static lang=en in index.html — all pages classified as English pre-JavaScript by crawlers
Enables: I018 (lang fix makes Spanish routes properly classified)
RecommendedAction: No static fix possible for CSR SPA. Add a note in meta: the runtime seo.ts sets documentElement.lang dynamically — this is acceptable for Googlebot but imperfect for pre-render. BETTER: set lang=es in _redirects or use prerendering for ES routes.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify hreflang + lang attribute consistency after Sprint 1 hreflang fix (I008).

Title: No /es/recursos route — Spanish blog index entirely missing
BlockedBy: I008 (hreflang fix must be in place first)
Enables: I022 (ES counterparts need a hub to link to)
RecommendedAction: Create /es/recursos route in App.tsx. Render Resources.tsx in ES mode with isEs=true. Add proper hreflang pair (/resources ↔ /es/recursos).
QAOwnerNotes: Verify /es/recursos returns 200 and displays Spanish blog index. Verify hreflang reciprocity between /resources and /es/recursos.

Title: FAQ; Safety; HowItWorks titles/descriptions not keyword-targeted — missing informational query traffic
RecommendedAction: Write explicit keyword-targeted title and description strings for each page. Do not rely on i18n keys for SEO meta. Examples: FAQ → Venezuelan Dating FAQ; Common Questions | MatchVenezuelan; Safety → How to Date Venezuelan Women Safely | MatchVenezuelan
QAOwnerNotes: Check each page title in Google Search Console after indexing.

Title: Safety page has ~150 words of prose — thin content on a YMYL page
RecommendedAction: Expand Safety page to 800+ words with dedicated sections: How Our Moderation Works; Romance Scam Red Flags (with specific patterns); What Happens After You Report; Verification Process Explained.
QAOwnerNotes: Run word count check after edit. Verify content depth vs competitors ranking for Venezuelan dating safety.

Title: HowItWorks page has ~200 words — thin content; H1 jumps to H3 without H2 wrapper
RecommendedAction: Expand to 600+ words with substeps and cultural context. Add H2 section wrapper above H3 step cards to fix heading hierarchy gap.
QAOwnerNotes: Run word count check. Verify H2 wrapper in rendered DOM after edit.

Title: Missing ES counterparts for strategic markets — Madrid; dating-culture; travel pages
BlockedBy: I008 (hreflang fix must be in place first); I018 (/es/recursos for hub context)
RecommendedAction: Add ES content objects and routes for: Madrid (highest priority); dating-culture; travel-to-meet; visit-venezuela. After routes exist add correct hreflang pairs.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify each new ES route returns 200. Verify hreflang pairs are reciprocal using hreflang.org.

Title: Missing ES counterparts for secondary markets — Barcelona; Buenos Aires; Chicago; Atlanta
BlockedBy: I022 (primary ES routes first); LP rewrites (rewrite EN pages before adding ES versions)
RecommendedAction: Add ES counterparts after EN rewrites are complete. Do not add ES versions of pages that still have thin English content.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify EN rewrite quality before creating ES counterparts.

Title: EN-only pages (Legal; HowItWorks) use 3-hreflang fallback — falsely signal ES versions at EN URLs
RecommendedAction: Batch with I008 fix. Ensure all EN-only pages that have no ES counterpart declare only [en; x-default] hreflang.
QAOwnerNotes: hreflang.org validator — specifically test /aup and /how-it-works URLs.

Title: Client-side blog pagination invisible to crawlers — page 2+ posts never discovered via index
RecommendedAction: Add ?page=N URL parameter to Resources pagination. Alternatively ensure all post slugs remain in sitemap as blog grows.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify page 2 posts discoverable via sitemap after fix.

Title: Favicon and apple-touch-icon point to 1.48MB logo.png — massive browser tab download
BlockedBy: I004 (logo compression — at minimum compress before fixing icon too)
AffectedRoutes: Create proper 32x32 favicon.ico and 192/512px PWA icons. Add site.webmanifest. Add <meta name=theme-color content=#8B1A4A>.
RecommendedAction: Verify favicon renders correctly in browser tab and mobile homescreen.

Title: RSS feeds /rss.xml and /rss-es.xml served via Supabase edge function — output unverified
RecommendedAction: Fetch both URLs and verify valid RSS 2.0 XML is returned. If not: fix edge function or create static RSS files.
QAOwnerNotes: Validate XML output with W3C Feed Validator.

Title: No Vite code splitting — 1.4MB single JS bundle delays TTI and INP on all pages
BlockedBy: I003+I004 (image fixes deliver LCP improvement; code splitting delivers TTI/INP)
AffectedRoutes: Add rollupOptions.output.manualChunks: split vendor; supabase; react-router; markdown into separate chunks. Use dynamic import() for admin/app routes.
RecommendedAction: Lighthouse TTI and INP scores before/after. Target: <200ms INP; <3s TTI mobile.

Title: Landing pages have JSON-LD breadcrumbs only — no visible HTML breadcrumb nav for users or crawlers
RecommendedAction: Add visible HTML breadcrumb nav above H1: Home > [Category] > [Page]. This reinforces JSON-LD and provides clickable navigation.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify breadcrumb renders in DOM and JSON-LD BreadcrumbList remains consistent.

Title: MERGE venezuelan-women-in-maturin — thin doorway-page risk with no ES counterpart
RecommendedAction: Remove slug from landingPages.ts. Add 301 redirect in _redirects: /venezuelan-women-in-maturin → /meet-venezuelan-women or a new /venezuelan-cities hub. Update sitemap.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify 301 redirect returns correct Location header. Verify removed slug no longer appears in sitemap.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-ciudad-guayana — industrial city; weak intent; template-swapped content
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with Orinoco delta / Angostura cultural angle and local dating intent framing (not diaspora). Reach 800+ authentic words. Add ES counterpart only after EN passes review.
QAOwnerNotes: Review rewritten content against original — verify meaningfully differentiated from other VZ city pages.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-boston — thin content; small community; no authentic local data
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with Cambridge/Greater Boston Venezuelan academic community angle (Harvard; MIT connections). If 800+ authentic words not achievable: escalate to MERGE into /venezuelan-women-in-united-states.
QAOwnerNotes: Word count must reach 800+ with authentic local specifics before staying indexed.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-chicago — template-swapped; no ES counterpart; smaller diaspora
Enables: I022b (create ES after EN rewrite complete)
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with Pilsen/Humboldt Park Venezuelan community angle. Differentiate tone from Sun Belt city pages (Chicago is colder; different Venezuelan migration pattern).
QAOwnerNotes: Content must differ meaningfully from Dallas/Atlanta/Orlando pages after rewrite.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-atlanta — template-swapped; no ES counterpart; Buford Highway unused
Enables: I022b (create ES after EN rewrite complete)
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with Buford Highway Venezuelan restaurant district angle. Atlanta as Southeast hub for Venezuelan professionals. Buford Highway is nationally known — strong authentic differentiator.
QAOwnerNotes: Buford Highway angle must be explicitly referenced in H2 and body content.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-dallas — city-swap pattern; sections identical to Orlando/Atlanta
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with North Dallas/Addison Venezuelan community angle. Oil and gas industry connection to Venezuelan engineers is a genuine differentiator. 800+ words required.
QAOwnerNotes: Content must differ meaningfully from Atlanta and Orlando pages. Spot-check for shared paragraphs.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-orlando — generic sections; theme-park worker diaspora angle unused
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with Disney/theme-park worker diaspora angle. International Drive Venezuelan community is authentic. Tourism-corridor framing differentiates from other FL cities.
QAOwnerNotes: Verify sections are meaningfully different from Dallas/Atlanta pages. Remove shared boilerplate.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-washington-dc — diplomatic/political refugee angle completely unused
Enables: I022b (create ES after EN rewrite — HIGH priority for DC)
RecommendedAction: Rewrite leading with DC Venezuelan political diaspora — asylum seekers; political refugees; Venezuelan embassy staff. Human-rights angle no competitor can authentically replicate. 1000+ words.
QAOwnerNotes: This page has the highest differentiation potential of all REWRITE pages. Treat as a priority content asset.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-buenos-aires — no ES counterpart; copy generic; valid diaspora unused
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with Palermo/Villa Crespo Venezuelan community angle. Buenos Aires as quality-of-life destination for Venezuelan professionals.
QAOwnerNotes: Create ES counterpart after EN rewrite quality passes review.

Title: REWRITE venezuelan-women-in-barcelona — sections similar to Madrid; no ES counterpart; smaller community
RecommendedAction: Rewrite with Catalan+Venezuelan cultural contrast angle. Barcelona as alternative to Madrid for Venezuelan creatives and professionals. Eixample reference.
QAOwnerNotes: Must differ clearly from Madrid page in angle and framing.
